CustomField.description: 18-char case-safe Salesforce Contact Id, exposed as a normal (formula) field so the native Constant Contact connector can push it into a CC custom field during the SF->CC import. Gives the inbound poller a stable, unambiguous key to match CC records back to this Contact (avoids email-only matching). JSI-107 / Jason Ott.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Read-only Salesforce ID pushed into Constant Contact so opt-outs/bounces/engagement can be matched back. Do not use for anything else.
CustomField.label: Salesforce ID (for CC)
